title: gratiola brevifolia
intro: Gratiola brevifolia, also known as short-spurred blue-cup or American balm, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its calming and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and compounds like rosmarinic acid and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gratiola brevifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Gratiola brevifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
